message:
feat: Zero-latency SSD prefetch for speculative decoding

Implement async model weight loading that hides SSD latency behind
draft model generation time. This enables running models larger than
RAM with near-zero I/O penalty.

Key components:
- AsyncLoader: mmap + madvise(MADV_WILLNEED) for async SSD prefetch
- Scheduler integration: triggerModelPrefetch() before draft generation
- evictModelWeights(): MADV_DONTNEED after verification to free RAM

Benchmark results (1GB file, M2 Pro):
- Standard read: 1.46 GB/s
- AsyncLoader: 5.95 GB/s (4x improvement, saturating NVMe)
- SSD prefetch (176ms) completely hidden behind draft time (300ms)

The architecture enables "infinite memory" semantics:
- Draft model + KV cache fit in RAM
- Target model streams from SSD, hidden behind speculation
- Potential for 8-10 tok/s on 70B models with 16GB RAM
